description: Real capture (2026-07-09, SDK 0.3.206) replacing the semi-synthetic CLI-2.1.170 queued-message fixture. A 12s foreground turn receives a queued user message mid-turn. Includes the new command_lifecycle frames: queued -> started -> completed for the queued command_uuid, and completed for the initial command. Real-shape quirk: both commands merge into a SINGLE result message (one result, two command_lifecycle:completed). Guards queued-message idle accounting and (future) lifecycle-driven ghost states.
